home.hero_title: Give Baby Items a Second Life
home.hero_subtitle: Donate or sell baby clothes, strollers, and more to families who need them
home.testimonials_desc: Join thousands of families sharing and finding baby items on MamVibe
home.how_it_works_subtitle: List or find baby items in just a few simple steps
home.step1_desc: Take a quick photo of the items you'd like to donate or sell.
home.step2_desc: Choose to donate for free or set a fair price for your items.
home.step3_desc: Connect with families nearby and arrange a convenient exchange.
home.step4_desc: Help families and give baby clothes a beautiful second life.
home.support_body: No ads, no sponsors, no catch. If this place has made your family's life even a little easier, a small coffee keeps the lights on.
home.shop_by_age_subtitle: Find the perfect size for your little one
home.places_subtitle: Discover spots loved by families across Bulgaria
home.brands_title: Items from brands you know & love
home.features_subtitle: Built for Bulgarian families — every feature you'd expect, and a few you won't find elsewhere
home.feat_price_drop_desc: Get notified the moment a liked item drops in price
home.feat_saved_search_desc: Save any search and receive a ping when a matching item appears
home.feat_offers_desc: Negotiate directly with sellers via counter-offers
home.feat_bundles_desc: Purchase multiple items from one seller in a single order
home.feat_bump_desc: Push your item to the top of results for 24 hours
home.feat_follow_desc: Follow your favourite sellers and get notified when they list something new
home.feat_holiday_desc: Going away? Pause your listings with one tap
home.feat_condition_desc: Standardised condition levels so buyers know exactly what they're getting

connect.heading: Bank payouts
connect.subtitle: Stripe Express handles your seller payouts — bank details, tax forms, and KYC are managed on Stripe's side.
connect.loadError: Could not load your payout status.
connect.onboardingError: Could not start Stripe onboarding. Please retry.
connect.dashboardLinkError: Could not open your Stripe dashboard.
connect.refreshHint: If you just finished onboarding, refresh the page to pick up the latest status.

none.title: Set up payouts to start selling
none.body: We use Stripe Express to handle seller payouts safely. You'll spend ~3 minutes adding your name, ID, and bank details — Stripe holds them, not us. After verification you can list paid items and receive money directly.

pending.title: Stripe is still verifying you
pending.body: Your onboarding isn't finished. Stripe usually needs an extra detail like a document upload or address confirmation. Resume onboarding to finish.

verified.title: You're all set
verified.body: Stripe has verified your account. Sales of paid listings will be sent directly to your bank via Stripe. Open your Stripe dashboard to see balances, payouts, and tax forms.

restricted.title: Stripe needs more information
restricted.body: Your Stripe account has been restricted — usually because Stripe needs an updated document or bank detail. Open Stripe to see exactly what's required, then return here.

required.title: Set up payouts first
required.body: Before listing a paid item, we need a verified Stripe payout account so the money has somewhere safe to go. It takes a few minutes on Stripe's side. Donation listings are unaffected.

common.cookie_message: We use cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to visit this site you agree to our use of cookies.
common.cookie_settings_desc: The options below allow you to manage your consent for the cookies set on this website. You can manage your preferences anytime by clicking the cookie icon at the bottom-left corner.
common.cookie_strictly_necessary_desc: These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be disabled.
common.cookie_functional_desc: These cookies allow us to remember choices you make (such as language or region) and provide enhanced, more personalised features.
common.cookie_analytics_desc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
common.cookie_third_party_desc: These cookies are set by third-party services that appear on our pages, such as embedded content or social sharing features.
common.error_loading: Something went wrong. Please try again.

privacy.warning_subtitle: Your message may contain sensitive personal information
privacy.tip_1: Never share your EGN, bank account details, or passwords in chat
privacy.tip_2: MamVibe will never ask you to pay or transfer money outside the platform
privacy.tip_3: Be suspicious of users who want to move the conversation to WhatsApp, Telegram, or email
privacy.tip_4: Always check the other person's ratings and reviews before sharing personal data

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.hero_subtitle: This policy applies to mamvibe.com and all MamVibe services.
privacyPage.s1_p1_mid: ) is the controller of personal data collected through this platform. You can reach us at
privacyPage.s1_p2: MamVibe is a Bulgarian second-hand baby and children's marketplace operating under the laws of the Republic of Bulgaria and the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — Regulation (EU) 2016/679).
privacyPage.s2_google: Google account ID (if you register via Google OAuth)
privacyPage.s2_titles: Item titles, descriptions, photos, prices, and condition
privacyPage.s2_payment: Payment records (amount, status, Stripe session ID — we do not store card numbers)
privacyPage.s2_tracking: Shipment tracking numbers and courier provider
privacyPage.s2_chat: Messages exchanged between users via the in-app chat
privacyPage.s2_feedback: Feedback and star ratings submitted by you
privacyPage.s2_reviews: Doctor reviews and child-friendly place entries you create
privacyPage.s2_ip: IP address (used for security and abuse prevention)
privacyPage.s2_expo: Expo push notification token (mobile app users)
privacyPage.s2_audit: Security audit log entries (login events, admin actions)
privacyPage.s3_li_1: To create and manage your account
privacyPage.s3_li_2: To display your listings to buyers and process purchases
privacyPage.s3_li_3: To facilitate real-time chat between buyers and sellers
privacyPage.s3_li_5: To generate and send e-bill receipts and fiscal receipts
privacyPage.s3_li_6: To coordinate shipping with Econt, Speedy, or Box Now
privacyPage.s3_li_7: To send transactional emails (password reset, order confirmation, shipping updates)
privacyPage.s3_li_8: To moderate listings using AI-assisted content review
privacyPage.s3_li_9: To detect fraud, abuse, and policy violations
privacyPage.s3_li_10: To improve the platform and understand how users interact with it
privacyPage.s3_ai_text: When you use the AI listing assistant or AI moderation, your item photos and text may be sent to Anthropic's Claude API for processing. No data is stored by Anthropic beyond the immediate API call.
privacyPage.s5_p1: We engage trusted third-party processors to operate the platform. Each processor is bound by a data processing agreement and processes data only on our documented instructions.
privacyPage.s5_cf_purpose: Invisible bot protection — Cloudflare Turnstile on login, register & password reset
privacyPage.s5_cf_data: IP address, browser fingerprint, interaction timing signals. Not used for advertising. Processed under Cloudflare's DPA.
privacyPage.s5_no_sell: We do not sell your personal data to third parties, and we do not share it for advertising or profiling purposes.
privacyPage.s6_account_text: retained while your account is active. Deleted within 30 days of account closure on request.
privacyPage.s6_payment_text: retained for 5 years to comply with Bulgarian accounting and tax law (Закон за счетоводството, Art. 12).
privacyPage.s6_chat_text: retained until you delete the conversation or your account is closed.
privacyPage.s6_audit_text: retained for 31 days, then automatically deleted by the Loki log compactor.
privacyPage.s6_listings_text: marked as deleted immediately but removed from storage within 90 days.
privacyPage.s7_p1_pre: Under the GDPR you have the following rights regarding your personal data. To exercise any of them, email
privacyPage.s7_access_text: request a copy of all data we hold about you.
privacyPage.s7_erasure_text: request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten"), subject to legal retention obligations.
privacyPage.s7_portability_text: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacyPage.s7_restriction_text: ask us to pause processing while a dispute is resolved.
privacyPage.s7_objection_text: object to processing based on legitimate interests.
privacyPage.s7_withdraw_text: where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw it at any time without affecting prior processing.
privacyPage.s7_dpa_pre: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the
privacyPage.s7_dpa_post: 2 Prof. Tsvetan Lazarov Blvd, Sofia 1592, Bulgaria.
privacyPage.s8_cookie_note: This is an essential authentication cookie. It cannot be read by JavaScript and is exempt from cookie consent requirements.
privacyPage.s8_local_1: Your public profile data (name, avatar) — to avoid a network round-trip on page load
privacyPage.s8_no_analytics: We do not use analytics cookies, advertising cookies, or any third-party tracking scripts.
privacyPage.s9_intro: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data:
privacyPage.s9_tls: All data in transit is encrypted via TLS 1.2+
privacyPage.s9_hash: Passwords are hashed using PBKDF2 via ASP.NET Core Identity
privacyPage.s9_tokens: Authentication tokens are short-lived (15-minute access tokens)
privacyPage.s9_stripe: Payment card data is never stored — Stripe handles all card processing
privacyPage.s9_owasp: The platform is tested against the OWASP Top 10
privacyPage.s9_rate: Production servers have rate limiting, IP-based abuse controls, and audit logging
privacyPage.s9_turnstile: Login, registration, and password-reset forms are protected by Cloudflare Turnstile — an invisible bot-detection challenge that collects no advertising data and is designed to meet GDPR requirements
privacyPage.s9_disclose_pre: If you discover a security vulnerability, please disclose it responsibly to
privacyPage.s10_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be announced via email or an in-app notification at least 14 days before they take effect. The "Effective date" at the top of this page always reflects the latest version.
privacyPage.s10_p2: Continued use of MamVibe after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPage.s11_intro: For any privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights:

termsPage.title: Terms & Conditions
termsPage.hero_subtitle: By creating an account or using MamVibe, you agree to these terms.
termsPage.s1_p1_mid: ) form a legally binding agreement between you and MamVibe. By registering an account, browsing listings, or using any feature of the platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our
termsPage.s1_p2: If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not use MamVibe.
termsPage.s2_li_1: You must be at least 18 years old to register and use MamVibe.
termsPage.s2_li_2: Minors aged 13–17 may use the platform only with the explicit consent and active supervision of a parent or legal guardian, who accepts these Terms on their behalf.
termsPage.s2_li_3: You must not be subject to any court order, legal restriction, or regulatory prohibition that would prevent you from entering into binding contracts.
termsPage.s2_li_4: If you register on behalf of a business entity, you confirm that you have authority to bind that entity to these Terms.
termsPage.s3_registration_p: You must provide accurate, current, and complete information when registering. You are responsible for keeping your account details up to date.
termsPage.s3_cred_li_1: Keep your password confidential. Never share it with anyone, including MamVibe staff.
termsPage.s3_cred_li_2_pre: You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account. If you suspect unauthorised access, contact us immediately at
termsPage.s3_cred_li_3: One person may register only one account.
termsPage.s3_term_pre: You may delete your account at any time via Settings. We may retain certain data as required by law — see Section 6 of our
termsPage.s4_accuracy_p: All listings must accurately represent the item being offered. Photos must show the actual item. Prices must be stated in Euros (EUR). You must disclose any material defects, damage, or missing parts.
termsPage.s4_condition_pre: You must select the correct condition category:
termsPage.s4_condition_post: Misrepresenting condition is grounds for account suspension.
termsPage.s4_sell_text: item is offered at the stated price. Payment is processed through MamVibe; do not accept external payments.
termsPage.s4_donate_text: item is offered free of charge. No payment is collected by MamVibe. Shipping arrangements are between the parties.
termsPage.s4_moderation_p: New listings are reviewed by an AI moderation system and may be held for manual review by our team. Listings that violate these Terms will be removed without notice.
termsPage.s4_warning: You are solely responsible for the accuracy of your listings. MamVibe is a marketplace facilitator — we are not the seller and do not take title to any item.
termsPage.s5_li_1: By submitting a purchase or purchase request, you enter into a binding contract with the seller. Offers accepted through the purchase-request flow are commitments to buy.
termsPage.s5_li_2: Review all listing photos and descriptions carefully before purchasing. Contact the seller via in-app chat if you have questions.
termsPage.s5_li_3: MamVibe is not a party to the transaction between buyer and seller. However, the dispute process exists to protect both parties.
termsPage.s6_payment_p: MamVibe supports card payments via Stripe and cash on delivery. Card data is handled exclusively by Stripe — MamVibe never stores card numbers.
termsPage.s6_fees_p: MamVibe does not currently charge a commission on transactions. This may change — any fee changes will be communicated 30 days in advance.
termsPage.s6_ebills_p: An electronic payment receipt (e-bill) is automatically issued for every completed sale. E-bills are available in your Dashboard and can be resent to your email.
termsPage.s6_warning: Payments made outside the MamVibe platform (cash, bank transfer, external apps) are at your own risk and are not covered by our escrow or dispute process.
termsPage.s7_p1: MamVibe integrates with Econt Express, Speedy, and Box Now for domestic Bulgarian shipping. Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on weight, dimensions, and destination.
termsPage.s7_li_1: Sellers are responsible for packaging items securely and handing them to the courier within 3 business days of a confirmed order.
termsPage.s7_li_2: Shipping labels can be downloaded from your Dashboard after a shipment is created.
termsPage.s7_li_3: Buyers and sellers can track shipments in real time via the Shipment detail page.
termsPage.s7_li_4: MamVibe is not responsible for courier delays, lost parcels, or damage in transit. Disputes must be filed with the courier directly.
termsPage.s8_item_1: Items that have been recalled by manufacturers or safety authorities
termsPage.s8_item_2: Car seats older than 6 years or with unknown crash history
termsPage.s8_item_3: Baby sleep products that do not meet current EU safety standards
termsPage.s8_item_5: Weapons, alcohol, tobacco, drugs, or adult content
termsPage.s8_item_6: Stolen goods or items obtained illegally
termsPage.s8_item_7: Medicines, supplements, or medical devices (unless by a licensed professional)
termsPage.s8_item_8: Items subject to export restrictions or sanctions
termsPage.s8_conduct_1: Spamming, harassment, or threatening other users
termsPage.s8_conduct_2: Attempting to conduct transactions outside the platform to avoid fees
termsPage.s8_conduct_3: Creating multiple accounts to evade bans
termsPage.s8_conduct_4: Uploading malicious code or attempting to compromise platform security
termsPage.s8_conduct_5: Scraping, data-mining, or automated access without prior written consent
termsPage.s9_p1: MamVibe uses AI (Anthropic Claude) to assist with listing creation, price suggestions, and content moderation. These features are provided as-is for convenience.
termsPage.s9_li_1: AI-generated titles, descriptions, and price suggestions are starting points — you are responsible for verifying their accuracy before publishing.
termsPage.s9_li_2: AI moderation may incorrectly flag legitimate listings or miss prohibited content. Our human team reviews flagged items.
termsPage.s9_li_3: MamVibe is not liable for decisions made on the basis of AI-generated content.
termsPage.s10_p1: The MamVibe brand, logo, design system, and platform code are the property of MamVibe and may not be reproduced without written permission.
termsPage.s10_p2: By uploading photos or text to MamVibe, you grant us a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide licence to display, resize, and cache that content solely for the purpose of operating the platform. You retain all ownership of your content and may request its deletion at any time.
termsPage.s11_intro: MamVibe is a marketplace platform — we facilitate transactions but are not a party to them. To the maximum extent permitted by Bulgarian and EU law:
termsPage.s11_li_1: MamVibe is not liable for the quality, safety, legality, or description of items listed by sellers.
termsPage.s11_li_2: We are not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental loss arising from use of the platform.
termsPage.s11_li_3: Our total liability to you for any claim is limited to the amount you paid to us (platform fees) in the 12 months preceding the claim.
termsPage.s11_footer: Nothing in these Terms limits liability for death, personal injury, or fraud caused by our negligence.
termsPage.s12_intro: We may suspend or permanently ban an account if you:
termsPage.s12_li_1: Violate these Terms or our community guidelines
termsPage.s12_li_3: Receive repeated negative ratings or unresolved disputes
termsPage.s12_li_4: Commit fraud or attempt to circumvent the payment system
termsPage.s12_footer_pre: In serious cases (fraud, illegal items) suspension may be immediate and without prior notice. You may appeal a suspension by contacting
termsPage.s13_p1_pre: These Terms are governed by the laws of the
termsPage.s13_p1_mid: . Any disputes that cannot be resolved amicably shall be referred to the competent courts of
termsPage.s13_p2: If you are a consumer resident in another EU member state, you may also benefit from mandatory consumer protection provisions of your country of residence and may use the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform at ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.
termsPage.s14_p1: We may revise these Terms at any time. For material changes we will notify you by email or in-app notification at least 14 days before the new terms take effect. The updated Terms will be published on this page with a new effective date.
termsPage.s14_p2: Continued use of MamVibe after the effective date of any revision constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.hero_subtitle_2: — an essential authentication token. No tracking, no analytics, no advertising cookies.
cookiesPage.s1_p1: Cookies are small text files placed on your device by a website. They allow the site to remember information about your visit — for example, whether you are logged in.
cookiesPage.s1_cat_necessary_desc: Required for the site to function. Cannot be disabled without breaking core features.
cookiesPage.s1_cat_analytics_desc: Collect aggregated data about how visitors use the site.
cookiesPage.s1_cat_advertising_desc: Build profiles to serve targeted ads across sites.
cookiesPage.s1_only_necessary: MamVibe uses only strictly necessary cookies. We do not use analytics or advertising cookies.
cookiesPage.s2_intro: MamVibe sets exactly one cookie on your browser:
cookiesPage.s2_row_purpose_val: Keeps you logged in across page refreshes without requiring your password again.
cookiesPage.s2_row_duration_val: 7 days (renewed on each login or token refresh)
cookiesPage.s2_row_httponly_val: Yes — JavaScript cannot read this cookie, protecting against XSS attacks
cookiesPage.s2_row_samesite_val: Strict — never sent on cross-site requests, protecting against CSRF
cookiesPage.s2_row_path_val: /api/v1/auth — sent only to authentication endpoints, not to unrelated API calls
cookiesPage.s2_row_content_val: An opaque token string (SHA-256 hash). It contains no personal data.
cookiesPage.s2_consent_label: Why is this cookie exempt from consent?
cookiesPage.s2_consent_text: Under the EU ePrivacy Directive and GDPR, cookies that are strictly necessary for a service explicitly requested by the user — such as maintaining a login session — do not require prior consent. You cannot use a logged-in account without this cookie.
cookiesPage.s3_p1: In addition to the cookie above, MamVibe uses your browser's Local Storage (a different storage mechanism — not a cookie) to improve performance and remember your preferences:
cookiesPage.s3_auth_stores: Your public profile (name, avatar, profile type). Never the access token.
cookiesPage.s3_consent_stores: Whether you accepted or rejected the cookie banner
cookiesPage.s3_footer: Local Storage items are not transmitted to our servers with every request (unlike cookies). They exist only in your browser and are never shared with third parties.
cookiesPage.s4_p1: MamVibe does not load any third-party analytics (Google Analytics, Mixpanel, Hotjar, etc.) or advertising scripts. We do not use Facebook Pixel, TikTok Pixel, or any similar tracking technology.
cookiesPage.s4_p2: The only external services that may interact with your browser are:
cookiesPage.s4_stripe_text: when you open the card payment page, Stripe may set its own cookies for fraud prevention. See stripe.com/privacy.
cookiesPage.s4_cf_text: sets a short-lived challenge cookie on the registration page to distinguish humans from bots. No cross-site tracking.
cookiesPage.s4_google_text: if you use "Sign in with Google", Google OAuth processes your authentication. See policies.google.com.
cookiesPage.s4_footer: These services act as independent data controllers for any data they collect. We do not control their cookie behaviour.
cookiesPage.s5_p1_post: cookie is essential to authentication, you cannot disable it while remaining logged in. You can, however:
cookiesPage.s5_logout_text: this immediately deletes the refreshToken cookie via the server and clears your local storage.
cookiesPage.s5_clear_text: in your browser's Developer Tools (Application → Storage → Clear site data) or via Settings → Privacy → Clear browsing data → Cookies.
cookiesPage.s5_incognito_text: cookies and local storage are discarded when the private window is closed.
cookiesPage.s5_chrome: Settings → Privacy → Cookies → See all site data
cookiesPage.s5_firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
cookiesPage.s5_edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions → Manage and delete cookies
cookiesPage.s6_p1_pre: For further details about how we process your personal data, see our

about.hero_title: Give baby items a second life
about.hero_subtitle: MamVibe is a free community marketplace where Bulgarian parents buy, sell, and donate second-hand baby and children's items — clothing, strollers, car seats, toys, furniture, and more.
about.mission_p1: Children grow fast — faster than parents can keep up with. The clothes, shoes, and gear that were perfect three months ago are already too small. MamVibe exists so that those items find a new home instead of a landfill.
about.mission_p2: We built a platform specifically for Bulgarian families: Bulgarian language support, integrated Econt and Speedy courier services, BGN prices, and a community that understands the local context. Whether you're in Sofia, Plovdiv, Varna, or a small town, MamVibe connects you with families nearby.
about.mission_p3: Listing an item takes under two minutes. Our AI content moderation reviews submissions instantly — most listings are live within seconds. Payments go through Stripe. Shipping is arranged directly on the platform through Econt or Speedy, with options for courier office pickup, home delivery, or parcel lockers.
about.value_sustainability_desc: Every item sold or donated is one less item in a landfill. We believe second-hand is the future of children's fashion and gear.
about.value_community_desc: MamVibe is built by parents, for parents. Real-time chat, seller ratings, doctor reviews, and child-friendly places are all part of a connected community.
about.value_trust_desc: AI content moderation, buyer reputation checks, a purchase request flow, and dispute resolution protect both sides of every transaction.
about.value_accessibility_desc: Registration is free. Listing is free. There are no monthly fees. Donations are supported — parents can give items away at no cost.
about.features_intro: MamVibe combines a marketplace, a community review platform, and a local directory into one app.
about.feat_marketplace_desc: Buy, sell, or donate clothing, shoes, strollers, car seats, toys, furniture, and feeding accessories across Bulgaria.
about.feat_doctors_desc: Browse verified parent reviews of Bulgarian paediatricians and gynaecologists, filtered by city and specialisation.
about.feat_places_desc: Discover parks, playgrounds, cafes, and family-friendly restaurants across Bulgaria, submitted by real families.
about.feat_chat_desc: Message sellers directly, negotiate prices, ask questions, or arrange local pickup — all inside MamVibe.
about.feat_payments_desc: Pay by card via Stripe or choose cash on delivery. Funds are held until you confirm receipt.
about.feat_shipping_desc: Econt and Speedy are integrated directly — no need to visit courier websites. Track shipments in your dashboard.
about.categories_desc: MamVibe covers everything a growing child needs, from newborn to school age.
about.cta_desc: Join thousands of Bulgarian families buying, selling, and donating baby items on MamVibe.
about.team_desc: MamVibe is a passion project built by a small team of parents who wanted to create something genuinely useful for Bulgarian families. We are early-stage, product-focused, and growing.
about.team_bozhidar_bio: Software developer and father who built MamVibe from the ground up — combining a marketplace, community reviews, and local discovery into one platform for Bulgarian families.

faq.page_subtitle: Everything you need to know about MamVibe.
faq.a_what_is: MamVibe is a free Bulgarian community marketplace where parents buy, sell, and donate second-hand baby and children's items. The platform also includes verified doctor reviews and a directory of child-friendly places across Bulgaria.
faq.a_free: Yes. Registration, browsing, and listing items are completely free. There are no monthly fees or subscription charges.
faq.a_languages: MamVibe is available in Bulgarian and English. You can switch languages at any time using the language toggle in the top-right corner.
faq.q_register: How do I create an account?
faq.a_register: Visit /register and sign up with your email and password, or use the "Continue with Google" button for one-click registration. You will be asked to choose a profile type (Mom, Dad, or Other).
faq.a_mobile: MamVibe is a progressive web application. You can access it from any mobile browser at mamvibe.com and add it to your home screen for an app-like experience. No download from an app store is required.
faq.q_buy_how: How do I buy an item?
faq.a_buy_how: Browse listings on /browse, click an item you like, then press "Send Purchase Request". The seller has 48 hours to accept. Once accepted, you complete payment by card via Stripe.
faq.q_buy_request_expire: What happens if the seller doesn't respond?
faq.a_buy_request_expire: If the seller does not respond within 48 hours, your purchase request is automatically cancelled and you can request another item.
faq.q_buy_confirm: Do I need to confirm receipt?
faq.a_buy_confirm: Yes. Once your item arrives, go to Dashboard → Purchases and confirm receipt. This releases the payment to the seller. If you do not confirm within 5 days of delivery, the purchase auto-confirms.
faq.q_buy_dispute: What if the item is not as described?
faq.a_buy_dispute: Open a dispute within 48 hours of delivery via Dashboard → Purchases → Report Problem. Disputes are reviewed by MamVibe admins and resolved within 3–5 business days. For urgent help email support@mamvibe.com.
faq.q_buy_donate: Can I get a donated (free) item?
faq.a_buy_donate: Yes. Listings marked as "Donate" are free. Send a purchase request as normal, and the seller will arrange transfer at no cost.
faq.q_sell_how: How do I list an item?
faq.a_sell_how: Log in, click "Create" in the top navigation, upload at least one photo, fill in the title, description, category, age group, and size, then set a price (or leave it blank to donate for free). Submit — most listings are approved by AI moderation instantly.
faq.a_sell_moderation: Automatic AI content moderation reviews listings within seconds. Clear listings with good photos and descriptions are approved instantly. Unusual or borderline items may go to manual admin review, which can take a few hours.
faq.q_sell_donate: How do I list an item as a donation?
faq.a_sell_donate: When creating a listing, leave the price field empty or set the listing type to "Donate". The item will appear as free for other families to request.
faq.q_sell_edit: Can I edit my listing after it is live?
faq.a_sell_edit: Yes. Go to Dashboard → My Listings, select the listing, and click Edit. Changes go through moderation again.
faq.q_sell_payout: When do I receive my money?
faq.a_sell_payout: Funds are released once the buyer confirms receipt (or after the 5-day auto-confirm window).
faq.a_pay_methods: You can pay by card via Stripe checkout or choose cash on delivery (COD) when using Econt or Speedy shipping.
faq.a_pay_secure: Yes. Card payments are processed by Stripe, a PCI DSS-certified payment provider. MamVibe never stores your card details. Funds are held in escrow until the buyer confirms receipt, protecting both parties.
faq.a_ship_couriers: MamVibe integrates Econt and Speedy — both major Bulgarian courier services. You do not need to visit their websites separately; everything is arranged inside MamVibe.
faq.a_ship_options: For both Econt and Speedy you can choose courier office pickup, home address delivery, or parcel locker. Cash on delivery (COD) is supported for both couriers.
faq.q_ship_track: How do I track my shipment?
faq.a_ship_track: Go to Dashboard → Shipments. Each shipment shows real-time tracking events from the courier.
faq.q_ship_when: How soon does the seller ship?
faq.a_ship_when: After payment is confirmed, the seller is expected to ship within 3 business days.
faq.a_doctors: Visit /doctor-reviews to browse verified parent reviews of Bulgarian paediatricians and gynaecologists. You can filter by city and medical specialisation. To submit a review, log in — it goes live after admin approval.
faq.a_places: The /child-friendly-places section is a crowdsourced directory of parks, playgrounds, cafes, and family-friendly restaurants across Bulgaria. Log in to submit a new place; it goes live after admin approval.
faq.a_ratings: After each completed sale, the buyer can rate the seller (1–5 stars with an optional comment). Ratings are visible on every seller's public profile page and help buyers make informed decisions.

hiw.title: How It Works
hiw.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start buying, selling, or donating on MamVibe in minutes.
hiw.buying_subtitle: From browsing to doorstep in a few easy steps.
hiw.buy_s1_desc: Open Browse (/browse) and use the filters — category, age group, price range, and listing type (for sale or donation). You can also type a keyword in the search bar.
hiw.buy_s2_desc: Click the item to view its photos and description. Press "Send Purchase Request" to notify the seller. You can also chat with the seller beforehand to ask questions or negotiate the price.
hiw.buy_s3_desc: The seller has 48 hours to accept or decline your request. If they do not respond, the request is automatically cancelled and the item becomes available again.
hiw.buy_s4_desc: Once the seller accepts, you have a short window to complete payment. Pay by card via Stripe checkout. Cash on delivery is also available when using Econt or Speedy.
hiw.buy_s5_desc: After payment, the seller ships within 3 business days via Econt or Speedy. Choose courier office pickup, home delivery, or parcel locker. Track your shipment in Dashboard → Shipments.
hiw.buy_s6_desc: Once your item arrives, confirm receipt in Dashboard → Purchases to release the payment to the seller. If you do not confirm within 5 days of delivery, the purchase auto-confirms.
hiw.buy_dispute_note: If an item arrives significantly different from its description, open a dispute within 48 hours of delivery via Dashboard → Purchases → Report Problem.
hiw.selling_subtitle: List your items in minutes. Most listings go live instantly.
hiw.sell_s1_desc: You must be logged in to list items. Click "Create" in the top navigation or visit /create. Upload at least one clear photo of the item (multiple photos are recommended).
hiw.sell_s2_desc: Enter a descriptive title, a detailed description of the item's condition and any relevant information, the category (clothing, shoes, strollers, etc.), the age group, and the size.
hiw.sell_s3_desc: Enter a price in BGN to sell the item. Leave the price field empty to donate it for free. Donations appear on the platform with a "Free" label and families can request them at no cost.
hiw.sell_s4_desc: Press Submit. AI content moderation reviews your listing automatically — most clear listings are approved and go live within seconds. Unusual items may take a few hours for manual admin review.
hiw.sell_s5_desc: When a buyer sends a purchase request, you have 48 hours to accept or decline. You will receive a notification. You can also chat with interested buyers before they send a request.
hiw.sell_s6_desc: After the buyer pays, ship the item via Econt or Speedy within 3 business days. Once the buyer confirms receipt (or after the 5-day auto-confirm), funds are released.
hiw.ship_p1: MamVibe integrates two major Bulgarian couriers: Econt and Speedy. You do not need to visit their websites — everything is handled inside MamVibe.
hiw.ship_office_desc: Collect the parcel from any Econt or Speedy office near you.
hiw.ship_home_desc: The courier delivers directly to your door.
hiw.ship_locker_desc: Drop-off or pick-up from an automated locker at a convenient location.
hiw.ship_cod: Cash on delivery (COD) is supported for both Econt and Speedy. This allows buyers to pay the courier in cash upon delivery instead of paying online.
hiw.ship_tracking: Track your shipment in Dashboard → Shipments. Real-time tracking events from the courier are displayed as the parcel moves.
hiw.pay_stripe_desc: Pay by debit or credit card securely via Stripe. MamVibe never stores your card details.
hiw.pay_cod_desc: Pay the courier in cash when they deliver your parcel. Available with both Econt and Speedy.
hiw.pay_escrow_desc: Payments are held until the buyer confirms receipt. This protects buyers from fraud and gives sellers confidence that they will be paid once the item is delivered.
hiw.comm_chat_desc: Message sellers directly at /chat (login required). Use it to ask questions, negotiate prices, or arrange local pickup. Unread message count is shown on the Chat icon in the navigation bar.
hiw.comm_doctors_desc: Browse verified parent reviews of Bulgarian paediatricians and gynaecologists at /doctor-reviews. Filter by city and specialisation. Log in to write a review — it is published after admin approval.
hiw.comm_places_desc: Discover parks, playgrounds, cafes, and family-friendly restaurants across Bulgaria at /child-friendly-places. Submit a new place after logging in — it goes live after admin approval.
hiw.comm_ratings_desc: After each completed sale, the buyer can rate the seller (1–5 stars with a comment). Ratings are visible on every seller's public profile page at /profile.
hiw.cta_text: Ready to give baby items a second life?
